content: Behind one of these walls, broken down in places, but held together with straggling ivy, and buttressed here and there with a bramble bush, Elzevir put me down at length and said, 'I am beat, and can carry thee no farther for this present, though there is not now much farther to go.
style_prompt: The man addresses others with his familiar deep voice, conversing with usual vitality.

content: 'Come,' said Elzevir, 'give me a charge or two, and there is half a crown for thee.' And he took the coin out of his pocket and showed it.
style_prompt: The speaker's speedy delivery and low tone contribute to his normal energy projection.

content: We had slept longer than we thought, for the sun was westering fast, and though the rest had refreshed me, my leg had grown stiff, and hurt the more in dangling when we started again.
style_prompt: The male speaker's fast-paced delivery, marked by a low tone, exudes an average level of energy.

content: They will not be back for some time yet, and, when they come, will not think to search closely for us hereabouts; but that we cannot risk, and must get clear away.

content: He whispered to me to lie still, so that it might not be perceived my leg was broken; and the boy replied:

content: But if we fall, why, we shall fall together, and outwit their cunning.

content: 'What! have you dropped your shot flask too?' asked the boy.

content: For the Zigzag started off as a fair enough chalk path, but in a few paces narrowed down till it was but a whiter thread against the grey white cliff face, and afterwards turned sharply back, crossing a hundred feet direct above our heads.
style_prompt: His low-pitched tone imparts his message with a deep, resonant quality, speaking at a standard pace.

content: So we gained a sorry matchlock, slugs, and powder, and the boy walked off over the furrow, whistling with his hand in his pocket, and a guinea and a crown piece in his hand.

content: A minute later he said: 'The boy is coming straight for the wall; we shall have to show ourselves'; and while he spoke there was a rattle of falling stones, where the boy was partly climbing and partly pulling down the dry wall, and so Elzevir stood up.

content: The cliff face was gleaming white, the sea tawny inshore, but purest blue outside, with the straight sunpath across it, spangled and gleaming like a mackerel's back.

content: And Elzevir, for all he was so strong, could not pull a helpless lump backwards up that path.

content: 'Scaring rooks for Farmer Topp,' was the answer.
